response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership experience across diverse stacks and domains, aligning well with the role’s technical and architectural demands; however, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there is limited evidence of formal project management or client-facing architectural advisory experience, which are critical for this executive-level consulting role.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js, DLang), and modern architectures
Strong mentorship and workshop experience demonstrating communication and knowledge-sharing skills
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', falling far short of the required C1 level
Lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, client requirements management, or formal architecture design documentation (e.g., UML)
No clear evidence of team leadership at executive level or operational oversight of multiple client projects
